free_text: Ge(n,n'gamma) Reactions and Low-Lying States of Ge
Protons on tritium gas cell 3 cm by 0.74 cm
Neutron bursts 6 - 8 nsec duration at 2 MHz repetition
Time-of-flight rate on Ge detector to view only

Neutron flux monitored by long counter.
